mapper.select: SELECT NVL(T.TRAIT_SEQ, 0) AS TRAIT_SEQ, OP.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, NVL(T.ATK_WEIGHT, 5) AS ATK_WEIGHT, NVL(T.DEF_WEIGHT, 5) AS DEF_WEIGHT, NVL(T.ASSIST_WEIGHT, 3) AS ASSIST_WEIGHT, NVL(T.HARASS_WEIGHT, 3) AS HARASS_WEIGHT, NVL(T.TRAIT_LEVEL, 1) AS TRAIT_LEVEL, P.PLAYER_NAME, P.RACE, OP.CURRENT_RARITY, P.PLAYER_IMG_URL, OP.CURRENT_ATTACK, OP.CURRENT_DEFENSE, OP.CURRENT_HP, OP.CURRENT_SPEED, OP.CONDITION AS CONDITION_STATUS, NVL(E.SLOT_NUMBER, 0) AS SLOT_NUMBER FROM TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS OP JOIN TBL_PLAYERS P ON OP.PLAYER_SEQ = P.PLAYER_SEQ LEFT JOIN PLAYER_TRAIT T ON OP.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = T.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ LEFT JOIN TBL_PVE_ENTRY E ON OP.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = E.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ WHERE OP.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY E.SLOT_NUMBER ASC NULLS LAST, OP.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ ASC
SELECT T.TRAIT_SEQ, T.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, T.ATK_WEIGHT, T.DEF_WEIGHT, T.ASSIST_WEIGHT, T.HARASS_WEIGHT, T.TRAIT_LEVEL FROM PLAYER_TRAIT T WHERE T.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLAYER_TRAIT ( TRAIT_SEQ, OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, ATK_WEIGHT, DEF_WEIGHT, ASSIST_WEIGHT, HARASS_WEIGHT, TRAIT_LEVEL, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_PLAYER_TRAIT.NEXTVAL, #{ownedPlayerSeq}, #{atkWeight}, #{defWeight}, #{assistWeight}, #{harassWeight}, #{traitLevel}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE PLAYER_TRAIT SET ATK_WEIGHT = #{atkWeight}, DEF_WEIGHT = #{defWeight}, ASSIST_WEIGHT = #{assistWeight}, HARASS_WEIGHT = #{harassWeight}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq}
UPDATE PLAYER_TRAIT SET TRAIT_LEVEL = #{traitLevel}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq}
